published_title: Subsidy Design in Privately-Provided Social Insurance: Lessons from Medicare Part D
authors: Francesco Decarolis; Maria Polyakova; Stephen P. Ryan
note: Retitled from conference version. Published JPE vol. 128 no. 5 (May 2020). NBER WP 21298 circulated as both 'Welfare Effects of Supply-Side Regulations...' and 'Subsidy Design in Privately-Provided Social Insurance...'; final journal title is the latter. Confirmed via search of AEA/JPE and Stephen Ryan (WUSTL) pages.
